DP.421.0000:
Where departed Pokémon sleep...
This is the Lost Tower.
DP.421.0001:
There is a broken, crumbling tower
made of stone...
DP.421.0002:
There is a broken, crumbling tower
made of stone...\f
There seems to be a spot that would
be a perfect fit for the Odd Keystone.\f
Would you like to use the Odd
Keystone?
DP.421.0003:
[0103,0000] pushed the Odd Keystone
into the stone tower.\f
The stone tower has been restored!
“Hallowed Tower” is written on it.
DP.421.0004:
It’s the Hallowed Tower.\f
It appears to have been built
many years ago.
DP.421.0005:
It’s the Hallowed Tower.\f
Its stones appear to have shifted...
DP.421.0006:
It’s the Hallowed Tower.\f
...Is that crying coming from inside
the tower?
DP.421.0007:
It’s the Hallowed Tower.\f
...Is the tower shaking ever so
slightly?
DP.421.0008:
It’s the Hallowed Tower.\f
There is some sort of presence...
It appears ready to emerge!
DP.421.0011:
Hmm!
[0108,0000] is really good!\f
Wouldn’t you agree?
DP.421.0012:
Hmm!
We’re of identical minds!\f
Hmm!
Take this [0108,0000]!\f
DP.421.0013:
Try fishing wherever there is
a body of water.\f
Oh, incidentally, do you need me to
explain how to use that fishing rod?
DP.421.0015:
First, you face any body of water,
then you use your fishing rod.\f
Next, you must focus!
If a Pokémon bites, “!” appears.\r
That’s your cue to reel it in!
DP.421.0016:
When you’re fishing for Pokémon,
the first hurdle is getting a bite.\f
When you start to reel that Pokémon
in, you’ve got to battle it.\f
So, fishing gives you twice the fun!
DP.421.0017:
Do you jog every morning?
Well, I do!
DP.421.0018:
When I was jogging the other day,
a wild Pokémon chased after me.\f
I swear, I ran on top of the water!
I was so freaked out!
DP.421.0021:
Trainer Tips\f
You may register one of the Key
Items in your Bag for instant use.\f
Simply press the Y Button to use the
registered item instantly.
